grills.name: Basic Grill
grills.description: The starting grill. Holds 2 meats at once. Cannot cook offline.

grills.name: Standard Grill
grills.description: An upgraded grill with 3 slots. Faster turnaround for active cooking.

grills.name: Pro Grill
grills.description: Professional grill with 4 slots and 10% faster cook speed.

grills.name: Elite Grill
grills.description: Elite grill with 5 slots and 20% faster cook speed. Great for high-volume cooking.

grills.name: Offline Grill (Basic)
grills.description: Earns money while you're away. Slower cook speed but passive income.

grills.name: Offline Grill (Pro)
grills.description: High-capacity offline grill. Better passive earnings than the basic version.

grills.name: Offline Grill (Elite)
grills.description: The best offline grill. 6 slots with full cook speed for maximum passive income.

grills.name: Basic Smoker
grills.description: Smokes meat slowly for a quality bonus. Works offline.

grills.name: Pro Smoker
grills.description: Advanced smoker with quality and weight bonuses. Great for premium meats.

_disclaimer: All values are estimates based on community data. Actual in-game values may differ after updates.
